highlights.text: Singapore & Sentosa (4N) ultimate theme park expedition
Universal Studios with priority express passes

itinerary.title: Singapore Universal Studios Special
itinerary.tagline: Universal Studios • Adventure Cove • S.E.A. Aquarium • Marina Bay
itinerary.overview: Dive into the thrilling world of entertainment with TRAGUIN's Universal Studios Special family tour. Focused on non-stop excitement and premium theme park access — Universal Studios express passes, S.E.A. Aquarium, Adventure Cove, and Sentosa leisure.
itinerary.seo_title: SG-003 | Singapore Universal Studios Special | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore theme park package (SG-003): Universal Studios express passes, S.E.A. Aquarium, Adventure Cove, and Marina Bay.

days.title: Arrival in Singapore & City Vistas
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to premium family hotel. Evening exploring breathtaking Marina Bay with spectacular water light show.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, Marina Bay water light show
Overnight Stay: Singapore & Sentosa (Premium Family Hotel)
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Universal Studios Full-Day Immersion
days.description: Full day at Universal Studios Singapore with pre-arranged priority express passes on all top movie-themed thrill rides.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Universal Studios Singapore full-day admission, express passes
Overnight Stay: Singapore & Sentosa (Premium Family Hotel)

days.title: Adventure Cove & S.E.A. Aquarium
days.description: Visit massive S.E.A. Aquarium to witness spectacular marine life. Afternoon at Adventure Cove Waterpark.
activities: Sightseeing Included: S.E.A. Aquarium, Adventure Cove Waterpark
Overnight Stay: Singapore & Sentosa (Premium Family Hotel)

days.title: Sentosa Island Leisure & Fun
days.description: Day of leisure on Sentosa Island with family-friendly attractions, beach time, and grand farewell dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sentosa Island leisure and attractions
Overnight Stay: Singapore & Sentosa (Premium Family Hotel)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium theme-park experience.

hotels.name: Resorts World Sentosa / Family Luxury Hotel

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in premium family hotel at Resorts World Sentosa or similar
Universal Studios Singapore with priority express passes
S.E.A. Aquarium and Adventure Cove Waterpark admission
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Singapore entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
